plugin-sports-slot.name: Sports Results
plugin-sports-slot.description: Real-time scores, standings, and schedules for soccer, NBA, NFL, and MLB.

footballDataApiKey.label: football-data.org API key
footballDataApiKey.description: Used for soccer clubs, fixtures, and standings.

balldontlieApiKey.label: BALLDONTLIE API key
balldontlieApiKey.description: Used for NFL, NBA, and MLB results.

debugMode.label: Debug mode
debugMode.description: Show plugin version next to data source footer.

plugin-sports-slot.noStandings: No standings were returned for that competition.
plugin-sports-slot.noFixtures: No recent or upcoming fixtures were found.
plugin-sports-slot.usageDescription: Run !sports <query> with a team, matchup, schedule, or standings query.
plugin-sports-slot.clubNotFound: That club was not found in the configured competition list.
plugin-sports-slot.ambiguousTeamHint: Try a league keyword like Premier League or La Liga if the team is ambiguous.
plugin-sports-slot.noRecentMatches: No recent or upcoming matches were found in the lookup window.
plugin-sports-slot.clubNotFoundInSameComp: One of the clubs was not found in the same supported competition.
plugin-sports-slot.noMeetingFound: No recent or upcoming meeting was found in the lookup window.
plugin-sports-slot.teamNotFound: That team was not found in the provider response.
plugin-sports-slot.teamNotFoundInResponse: One of the teams was not found in the provider response.
plugin-sports-slot.noRecentGames: No recent or upcoming games were found.
plugin-sports-slot.noRecentGamesInLookup: No recent or upcoming games were found in the lookup window.
plugin-sports-slot.noMeetingFoundShort: No recent or upcoming meeting was found.
plugin-sports-slot.addApiKeyBalldontlie: Add a BALLDONTLIE API key in the plugin settings.
plugin-sports-slot.addApiKeySoccer: Add a football-data.org API key in the plugin settings.
plugin-sports-slot.standingsUnsupportedBalldontlie: The free BALLDONTLIE tier does not expose standings for this sport. Scores and schedules still work.
plugin-sports-slot.queryUnsupported: That query shape is not supported yet.
